channel.title: reef entertainment on Últimas ofertas en consolas y gaming
channel.description: Recent content in reef entertainment on Últimas ofertas en consolas y gaming

item.title: Reef Entertainment - Cupid Parasite: Sweet and Spicy Darling – Day One Edition Nintendo Switch
item.description: Tienes Reef Entertainment - Cupid Parasite: Sweet and Spicy Darling – Day One Edition Nintendo Switch en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Rich, Decadent Visuals and Savory Scenarios – The original scenario writer and illustrator of Cupid Parasite return! Ririka Yoshimura (scenario writer) and Yuuya (illustrator) join forces once again to bring fans a delectable addition to the Cupid Parasite universe. In Sweetness and In Spiciness?! – You must choose the flavour of the next course.
